raw_text: Red Hat chromium-browser: Use after free in Codecs Red Hat Product Security rates the severity of this flaw as determined by the Google Chrome Security Advisory. Use after free in Codecs in Google Chrome prior to 147.0.7727.101 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform out of bounds memory access via a crafted video file. (Chromium security severity: High) An use after free flaw was found in the Codecs component of the Chromium browser. Upstream bug(s): https://code.google.com/p/chromium/issues/detail?id=500066234
